zh.lifeSummary: 當John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham於1338年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆時，他的父親Alexander Montgomery34歲，母親Margaret Douglas34歲。他於1362年之前與Elizabeth Eglinton在蘇格蘭雷福福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年6月25日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham于1338年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆时，他的父亲Alexander Montgomery34岁，母亲Margaret Douglas34岁。他于1362年之前与Elizabeth Eglinton在苏格兰雷福福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年6月25日在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham was born in 1338, in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Montgomery, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Douglas, was 34. He married Elizabeth Eglinton before 1362, in Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 June 1398, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham est né en 1338, à Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Montgomery, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Douglas, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Eglinton avant 1362, à Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1398, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham 1338 in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Montgomery 34 und seine Mutter Margaret Douglas 34. Er hat vor 1362 in Renfrewshire, Scotland Elizabeth Eglinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1398 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham è nato il nel 1338 nel Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Montgomery, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Douglas, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Eglinton prima del 1362, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 giugno 1398, nel Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eagleshamが1338年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエアグレシャムで生まれた時，父Alexander Montgomeryは34歳，母Margaret Douglasは34歳であった。1362年以前にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアでElizabeth Eglintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年6月25日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで60歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham(이)가 1338년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 이글레샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Montgomery(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Douglas(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1362년 이전 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 Elizabeth Eglinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 6월 25일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham nasceu em 1338, em Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Montgomery, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Douglas, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Eglinton antes 1362, em Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1398, em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham родился в 1338 г. в местности эаглешам, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Montgomery было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Douglas, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Eglinton перед 1362 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 июня 1398 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham nació en 1338, en Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Montgomery, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret Douglas, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Eglinton antes de 1362, en Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1398, en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.
